# The Kalamazoo Immigrant Solidarity Coalition (KISC.info) presents the powerful, moving, and award-winning new film:  

**Roads of Fire**  

![][image1]   

The lives of a human smuggler, an asylum seeker, and volunteers on the frontlines of a humanitarian emergency interweave in a harrowing examination of the global migration crisis.   
See the trailer at: roadsoffiredoc.com

**Sunday, April 26th**   
**3 pm**  
Portage United Church of Christ   
2731 W. Milham Avenue,  
Portage, MI

 **Q & A  with film's director (via Zoom) afterward**  
This event is free \-donations welcome.  
For more information please text 313 753 1179\.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
